title: Final Form replaces attack profile with six dice plus six

card.rawText: Equip to a creature below 1/2 its base HP. The creature loses its effect. Replace its base Atk Dice Rolls and Modifier with Mutating Flesh, 6 dice, +6.

effect.value: Equip to a creature below 1/2 its base HP. The creature loses its effect. Replace its base Atk Dice Rolls and Modifier with Mutating Flesh, 6 dice, +6.

plan.title: Final Form replaces attack profile with six dice plus six
plan.summary: Equip Final Form to a creature below half base HP and verify attack profile becomes 6 dice +6.

notes: Read text first: Equip to a creature below 1/2 its base HP. The creature loses its effect. Replace its base Atk Dice Rolls and Modifier with Mutating Flesh, 6 dice, +6.
Set equipped creature current hp to 40 before equipping Final Form.

steps: Set up Final Form according to its printed text.
Equip Final Form to a creature below half base HP and verify attack profile becomes 6 dice +6.

expectedAssertions.label: Equipped creature attack dice set to 6

manualVerification: Confirm against printed text: Equip to a creature below 1/2 its base HP. The creature loses its effect. Replace its base Atk Dice Rolls and Modifier with Mutating Flesh, 6 dice, +6.
riskNotes: Fixture is scoped to the deterministic headless route; red results should identify missing runtime support or assertion drift.
